name: Badami Gosht
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 inches fresh ginger, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a saucepan until hot.
2. Add cinnamon, cloves, and cardamom; fry for 1 minute.
3. Add onion and fry, stirring occasionally, until soft.
4. Add garlic and ginger and fry for 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Add lamb cubes and fry until evenly browned.
6. Beat yogurt, saffron mixture, and chili paste together; stir into lamb cubes.
7. Cook for 1 minute.
8. Beat almonds with enough water to form a thick paste; stir the paste into lamb cubes with salt.
9. Simmer for 15 minutes.
10. Stir in coconut milk and dried red chilis; reduce heat to low.
11. Simmer for 1 hour, or until lamb is cooked through and tender.
12. Uncover pan for last 10 minutes of cooking.
13. Transfer to a warmed dish and serve at once. (serves 4)
